verses.text: Tua mual panin Jesuh hong paisuk ciangin mihon tampi in amah a zui uh hi
Tua laitakin miphak khat hong pai-in ama mai-ah hong khukdin' a, “Topa aw, nong damsaknop nak leh nong damsak thei ding hi,” a ci hi
Jesuh in zong a khut zanin tua mipa lawng a, “Ka hong damsaknuam hi; dam ta in,” a cih khit phetin a phakna a dampah hi

Tua ciangin Jesuh in ama kiangah, “Hih thupiang kuama kiangah gen masa loin siampipa kiangah va paisuak pahin va kivelsak in la, na damkhitna thu mi khempeuh in a theihna dingin Moses thupiakna tawh kizui-in biakna va pia in,” ci-in a vaikhak hi.
Kapernaum khua a tun' ciangin Rom mi galkapbu khat ama kiangah hong pai-in
“Topa aw, ka nasempa cina-in inn-ah lupna ngakin om a, gim mahmahin tangzo hetlo ahih manin hong damsak in,” ci-in a thum hi
Jesuh in, “Hong pai-in ka damsak ding hi,” a ci hi
Ahi zongin galkapbupa in, “Topa aw, keima inn-ah nangpipi nong pai dingin kilawmlo ka hih manin a damna dingin thu pia lel lecin zong ka nasempa dam ding hi

Kei zong uliante khutnuai-ah nasem mi ka hi a, keima khutnuai-ah zong galkapte a om hi. Tua galkapte khat kiangah, ‘Pai in,’ ci-in sawl leng pai a, adang khat kiangah, ‘Hong pai in,’ ci-in sam leng hong pai a, ka nasempa kiangah, ‘Hih sem in,’ ci-in sawl leng a sem hi,” a ci hi
Jesuh in hih bupa thugen a zak ciangin lamdangsa a, amah a zui mihonte kiangah, “A mantaka kong genin-ah Israel mite lak nangawnah hih bang upna a nei ka mu nai kei hi
Nisuahna leh nitumna panin mi tampi tak hong pai-in vantung ki-ukna sungah Abraham, Isaac, leh Jakob-te tawh an ne-in sabuai-ah tukhawm ding uh hi
Ahi zongin vantung ki-ukna sungah a om dingin a kingaihsun Israel mite ahih leh pualam khuamialna-ah kilawnkhia ding a, tua lai-ah kapin a hagawi ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in galkapbupa kiangah, “Na inn-ah ciah in. Na up bangin hong piang ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua hun laitak teek mahin a nasempa a dam hi.
Peter' inn-ah Jesuh va pai a, Peter' sungnu nattunin lupna tungah a lum a mu hi
Jesuh in ama khut va lawn'sak hi. A natna dampah a, amah zong tho-in a zinte a dozo pah hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Jesuh in Nitakin Mi Tampi Damsak

verses.text: A nitak ciangin mite in Jesuh kiangah dawivei mi tampi tak hong paipih uh hi. Jesuh in kam khat pauna bek tawh dawite hawlkhia-in cina khempeuh a damsak hi
Kamsang Isaiah in, “Amah in eite' natna teng thuakin, eite' gimna teng puakhia hi,” ci-in a genna thu a tun'na dingin hih bang a piang ahi hi.
Jesuh in ama kiangah mi tampi tak a hong omlam a theih ciangin a nungzuite kiangah, “Tuili galkhatah pai ni,” ci-in a gen hi
Tua laitakin Thukham hilh siate khat in ama kiangah, “Sia aw, na paina peuhpeuhah ka hong zui ding hi,” a cih leh
Jesuh in, “Ngiate in lupna ding kua nei uh a, vasate in zong giahna ding bu nei uh hi. Ahi zongin Mihing Tapa in a luptheihna ding mun koimahah neilo hi,” ci-in a dawng hi
Tua ciangin amah a zui midang khat in, “Topa aw, kei hong ciahsak in la, ka pa hong vuisak masa in,” a cih leh
Jesuh in, “Nangmah in kei hong zui in la, misi bang ahi mite in misite a vui dingun nusiat in,” ci-in a dawng hi.
Gunkuang tungah Jesuh a tuan' ciangin a nungzuite in zong a zui uh hi
Thakhat thu-in huihpi hong nung ahih manin tuihualte in gunkuang tum dekdek a, ahi zongin Jesuh a ihmu hi
Nungzuite in Jesuh va phong uh a, “Topa aw, ka si dektak uh hi; hong hon in,” a va ci uh hi
Jesuh in, “Bang hangin tuaci lau na hi uh hiam? Na upna uh neu mahmah hi,” a cih khit ciangin tho-in huihpi leh tuihualte thu pia a, a dai dide pah hi
A nungzuite in lamdangsa mahmah uh a, “Huihpi leh tuihualte nangawn in ama thu mang ahih manin hih mipa a bangci mi hi ding ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi.
Tuili galkhat, Gadara gam a tun' ciangin han panin dawivei mi nih hong paikhia-in Jesuh a na dawn uh hi. Tua mi nihte kihtakhuai mahmah ahih manin amaute omna lam tawnin kuamah pai ngamlo uh hi
Amaute nakpi takin hong kiko uh a, “Pasian' Tapa aw, kote bang hong nuammawh na hi hiam? A hun tung nailopi-in kote gim a pia dingin hong pai na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi
Tua laitakin tua san panin a gamlalo mun khatah vok honpi gamta-in a om hi
Tua ciangin dawite in Jesuh kiangah, “Kote hong hawlkhia ding na hih leh hua vokte sungah hong lutsak in,” ci-in a thum uh ciangin
Jesuh in, “Pai un,” ci ahih manin amaute zong paikhia-in vokte sungah a lut uh hi. Tua vok honte, keen luvum panin tuaksuk gawpin tuili sung tu uh ahih manin a vekpi-in tuikia-in a si khin hi
Tua vokcingte zong tai-in khuasung tuh uh a, tua dawivei mite' thu leh a thupiang khempeuh a gen uh hi
Tua ciangin khuasung mi khempeuh, Jesuh kiangah hong pai-in amah a muh uh ciangin, amau gam panin a paikhiatna dingin a thum uh hi.
